_description: v7.8 Mechanism E + bridge-fields registry. Maps shared-write paths to merge strategy, dedup key, and enforcement mode. v7.8 ships every reducer in mode='advisory' (logs misses to .claude/logs/reducer-misses.json; never blocks the commit). v7.9 will flip mode='enforced' on entries that have ≥7 days of zero false-positives in the misses ledger. Pattern: Postgres ALTER TABLE ... NOT VALID → VALIDATE CONSTRAINT.

.claude/shared/measurement-adoption.json._note: Generated/overwritten by scripts/measurement-adoption-report.py; not mergeable by content.
